chapter_title.ar: باب عِدَّةِ أُمَّهَاتِ الْأَوْلَادِ وَ الرَّجُلِ يُعْتِقُ إِحْدَاهُنَّ أَوْ يَمُوتُ عَنْهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 78 – Waiting period of the mothers of the children, and the man who emancipates one of them, or he dies from her

text: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنِ الْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ فِي رَجُلٍ كَانَتْ لَهُ أَمَةٌ فَوَطِئَهَا ثُمَّ أَعْتَقَهَا وَ قَدْ حَاضَتْ عِنْدَهُ حَيْضَةً بَعْدَ مَا وَطِئَهَا قَالَ تَعْتَدُّ بِحَيْضَتَيْنِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said regarding a man who had a slave girl for him, so he copulated with her, then freed her, and she had menstruated when with him, a menstruation after him having copulated with her. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘She would observe a waiting period of two menstruations’.
